queries.question: Can you show all complaints for January 6, 2023 and also all lost properties on any given day?
queries.sql:
SELECT LostProperties.itemdescription as description
FROM Calendar JOIN LostProperties ON Calendar.Date = LostProperties.DateOfLoss
UNION
SELECT Complaints.description
FROM Calendar JOIN Complaints ON Calendar.Date = Complaints.SubmissionDate
WHERE Calendar.Date = "2023-01-06"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?calendar a :Calendar .
    ?lostproperties a :LostProperties .
    ?calendar p:Date ?date_l .
    ?lostproperties p:DateOfLoss ?dateofloss_r .
    ?lostproperties p:ItemDescription ?itemdescription .
    FILTER(STR(?date_l) = STR(?dateofloss_r))
    BIND(?itemdescription AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?calendar a :Calendar .
    ?complaints a :Complaints .
    ?calendar p:Date ?date_l .
    ?complaints p:SubmissionDate ?submissiondate_r .
    ?complaints p:Description ?description .
    ?calendar p:Date ?date_f .
    FILTER(STR(?date_l) = STR(?submissiondate_r))
    FILTER(STR(?date_f) = "2023-01-06")
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Which lost properties and complaints are associated with January 6, 2023?
queries.sql:
SELECT LostProperties.itemdescription as description
FROM Calendar JOIN LostProperties ON Calendar.Date = LostProperties.DateOfLoss
WHERE Calendar.Date = "2023-01-06"
UNION
SELECT Complaints.description
FROM Calendar JOIN Complaints ON Calendar.Date = Complaints.SubmissionDate
WHERE Calendar.Date = "2023-01-06"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?calendar a :Calendar .
    ?lostproperties a :LostProperties .
    ?calendar p:Date ?date_l .
    ?lostproperties p:DateOfLoss ?dateofloss_r .
    ?lostproperties p:ItemDescription ?itemdescription .
    ?calendar p:Date ?date_f .
    FILTER(STR(?date_l) = STR(?dateofloss_r))
    FILTER(STR(?date_f) = "2023-01-06")
    BIND(?itemdescription AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?calendar a :Calendar .
    ?complaints a :Complaints .
    ?calendar p:Date ?date_l .
    ?complaints p:SubmissionDate ?submissiondate_r .
    ?complaints p:Description ?description .
    ?calendar p:Date ?date_f .
    FILTER(STR(?date_l) = STR(?submissiondate_r))
    FILTER(STR(?date_f) = "2023-01-06")
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
}
